title: E-Commerce Platform
shortDesc: Full-stack e-commerce with React, Node.js, MongoDB. Payment integration, admin panel.
overview: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with the MERN stack. Includes product catalog, shopping cart, secure payment processing via Stripe, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for inventory and order management.
features: JWT authentication with role-based access (Admin / User)
Stripe payment integration with webhook verification
Real-time inventory tracking with stock alerts
Image upload with Cloudinary CDN
Order tracking and email notifications via Nodemailer
stack:
Frontend  : React 18, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS
Backend   : Node.js, Express.js, Mongoose
Database  : MongoDB Atlas
Payment   : Stripe API + Webhooks
Storage   : Cloudinary
Auth      : JWT + bcryptjs
Deploy    : Vercel (FE) + Railway (BE)

title: Hospital Management
shortDesc: Laravel-based hospital management system with patient records, appointments, billing.
overview: A comprehensive hospital management system developed with Laravel. Manages patient registrations, doctor schedules, appointments, billing, and pharmacy inventory in a unified dashboard.
features: Multi-role system: Admin, Doctor, Nurse, Pharmacist, Patient
Appointment booking with calendar view and reminders
Electronic health records (EHR) with lab reports
Billing and invoice generation (PDF export)
Pharmacy stock management with expiry alerts
stack:
Framework : Laravel 10 + Livewire
Database  : MySQL 8.0
Frontend  : Blade + Bootstrap 5
Auth      : Laravel Breeze (multi-guard)
Reports   : DomPDF
Deploy    : cPanel shared hosting

title: Enterprise ERP
shortDesc: .NET Core ERP system for manufacturing. Inventory, HR, payroll, and reporting modules.
overview: An enterprise ERP system for a manufacturing company built with ASP.NET Core. Modules include inventory management, HR, payroll, purchase orders, sales, and financial reporting.
features: Inventory with batch tracking and warehouse management
HR module: attendance, leave management, payroll
Real-time dashboards with Chart.js analytics
Azure Active Directory SSO integration
SSRS reports and Excel export functionality
stack:
Framework : ASP.NET Core 7 (MVC)
Language  : C# 11
Database  : SQL Server 2022 + EF Core
Auth      : Azure AD + Identity
Cloud     : Azure App Service + Blob Storage
CI/CD     : Azure DevOps Pipelines

title: Campus Network Design
shortDesc: Multi-building campus network with VLANs, inter-VLAN routing, redundancy, and APs.
overview: Designed and deployed a multi-building campus network for a university. Architecture covers 5 buildings with redundant core switches, inter-VLAN routing, and wireless access points throughout campus.
features: 99.9% uptime with redundant paths and HSRP
Isolated guest network with captive portal
QoS policies for VoIP and video conferencing
Network monitoring with SNMP + Zabbix
Dual ISP with BGP failover for internet redundancy
stack:
Core Layer    : 2x Cisco Catalyst 3750 (stacked)
Distribution  : 4x Cisco 2960 per building
Access Layer  : Unmanaged switches + WAPs
Routing       : OSPF Area 0 (backbone)
VLANs         : 10-Admin, 20-Faculty, 30-Student
               40-Library, 50-Lab, 60-Guest
Redundancy    : STP + HSRP for gateway failover

title: Real-Time Chat App
shortDesc: WebSocket-based real-time chat with rooms, file sharing, notifications, and encryption.
overview: A full-featured real-time messaging application with private DMs, group rooms, file sharing, read receipts, and end-to-end encryption. Built with WebSockets and Redis pub/sub for scalability.
features: Real-time messaging with Socket.io + Redis adapter
End-to-end encryption using libsodium
File sharing (images, PDFs) via S3-compatible storage
Push notifications via Firebase FCM
Message search with Elasticsearch
stack:
Frontend  : React 18 + Vite, Zustand
Backend   : Node.js + Express + Socket.io
Cache     : Redis (sessions + pub/sub)
Database  : MongoDB (messages) + PostgreSQL (users)
Search    : Elasticsearch
Deploy    : Docker Compose on VPS

title: Firewall System
shortDesc: Enterprise firewall and DMZ design with ACL rules, NAT configuration, and intrusion detection.
overview: Designed and implemented an enterprise firewall solution using Cisco ASA 5505. Created a 3-zone DMZ architecture separating public servers, internal network, and untrusted internet traffic.
features: 3-zone DMZ architecture (inside / DMZ / outside)
Named extended ACLs with logging for audit trail
Static NAT for DMZ servers, PAT for internal users
IDS/IPS integration for threat detection
Rate-limiting ICMP to prevent ping flood attacks
stack:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
  nameif outside     security-level 0
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
  nameif inside      security-level 100
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
  nameif dmz         security-level 50

object network WEB_SERVER
  host 192.168.2.10
  nat (dmz,outside) static 203.0.113.5
